steps.title: Translate the problem into equations
steps.content: The ribbon is cut into two parts that sum to 132 inches: $x + y = 132$. The phrase x is 12 more than 4 times y translates to: $x = 4y + 12$.

steps.title: Substitute and solve for x
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 4y + 12$ into the first equation:
$$(4y + 12) + y = 132$$
$$5y + 12 = 132$$
$$5y = 120$$
$$y = 24$$
Then $x = 4(24) + 12 = 108$. That matches Choice D — $108$.
